name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Friend, this is our chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Throughout this race, we have worked together to take on the DC elites and share our conservative message with Wisconsin.
Friend,

Throughout this race, we have worked together to take on the DC elites and share our conservative message with Wisconsin.

Over the last 11 months we’ve worked tirelessly in that pursuit, thousands of volunteer hours and emails...and all of it in pursuit of one very important day: Primary Day.

And, Friend, that day is **just one week — 7 DAYS— away now.**

In these final hours you can count on people to start showing their true colors. My opponent has been running misleading ads, smearing my record, and embracing every swamp tactic to divide conservatives before next Tuesday.

But let’s not forget – our biggest opponent is Senator Baldwin. Baldwin has voted in line with Chuck Schumer and liberal radicals to obstruct the America First agenda WE voted for. She opposed tax reform, supports a complete government takeover of health care and let our veterans down at the Tomah VA!

It’s easy to get distracted, but Friend, defeating Senator Baldwin is my real target. That’s _why we just cannot afford to fail in this primary. _

I’ve talked closely with my team, and we’ve figured out that we need just $100,000 to push us full speed ahead through these final days. So, Friend, I need to ask you for a personal favor —[**will you help me to victory by donating today?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9b60ee30d354f369e2aab56b0a146b1&_e=TSRUfBAPB2w_haZ6M6e17IRxlSA3FBKvHmeidqvP_mO53W7LjTFx-nBBfMtsXTOcj3f8EtVr64nVZ00AD1AXe4o36xEbwNSYg6o9oaNjujnJ8sfq4470EUi3s9FkvKx9hiy_AbPqY92VPdhhKm4ITYLO65EewjaurileifrRtZp5g4L1Sv7auJzCFq7aH_maKvqOmU2U-gZWVV_dwqokc8rldE2frV3ZKqozC_FhgBDp1Sck1GYNzF4nSFxISa7e69b7Fe1-rO1Omwd3ZmdXGpBfH-dKb43_ECHm7mboj2qPLlHMVUi11NMYeAzkCMcyv6DSvs5vl42pXtYnHl5VBK-N7gz8dQumHr_MoH5e8XlyJj77Zi5qm_tWmNf8dlynQ-9UNfk1suAPaxOk0Yh3kr0v_Kjg0HZVn7zAkol4kkc%3D)

**This is our last chance, Friend. **

For the next seven days, we’re going to have to work harder than ever before to prepare. We need to be out in the field. We need ads on the radio, on TV and on digital. We need to be doing everything we can to get the word out when it matters most — so we can WIN and take on Baldwin in November.

But, if we can raise $100,000 to maintain our momentum this week, we can and we WILL succeed.

**We’re running out of time. We need to come together NOW.**

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9b60ee30d354f369e2aab56b0a146b1&_e=TSRUfBAPB2w_haZ6M6e17IRxlSA3FBKvHmeidqvP_mO53W7LjTFx-nBBfMtsXTOcj3f8EtVr64nVZ00AD1AXe4o36xEbwNSYg6o9oaNjujnJ8sfq4470EUi3s9FkvKx9hiy_AbPqY92VPdhhKm4ITYLO65EewjaurileifrRtZp5g4L1Sv7auJzCFq7aH_manjj6n_ci8fvb0RUxoCIe-CT7emXMK4PyNBjkXblVfbE3CTVkOw0MlD_hQyiSnyDWo0Q2hbtZQE1UrGBu2W4DyKGyHof6__SLd-E65kkuz6ntPauig5aR8FGoykcCR93j9xLxqpMPC6KtPbaiC8vlGxhZnMqxF42XC0qg6P3s9__aiCmMW5NoH9hLYKpvAY4lUiBXYkGa7pVDehX-LgnWjmyO8CxATStm119Qd05TtOU%3D)

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9b60ee30d354f369e2aab56b0a146b1&_e=TSRUfBAPB2w_haZ6M6e17J0wf4wsKBoFwsebX-Q46q--SrGNM3WgctQ435pXOzSOWYKViPR6U2LqhOOz4t86aR5faf_8rVzq4uu4DIDYHAE0mwUB5mcESJiRhLXTmi2EIz68i7rdz50QzwCR9ErIoZasmUPkSpS_zl7tG_zUMKjQ-OPtYrbz2YzYmXCLBtryShHMZlNHT5xD4B04WVySrQkB2dVdJEGeKnnwGaoyDUoNqS-YPmj9cxJGmZRy_5sgYvQp866j1DbslRVhASELtqzQWsGJoqkkHmfC8hOHMsBVm7S-sQXwWyu7699-IAew9TnF7_BExfOHp2zFHPhtPigvon_K0Vz11b3zHUm63HoWqw5KyTdKHnEeGoZWZ6n-) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9b60ee30d354f369e2aab56b0a146b1&_e=TSRUfBAPB2w_haZ6M6e17J0wf4wsKBoFwsebX-Q46q9Hh8hNGABUNptV-TChTONxFQbFC__b80ZdImAo2Th3L-reGqDpQbLSv8ZtSyUlumr6R9l4yWhm8BtcswSQ75cdRdTxtUuuGObWiCpvPF3e_8cui5uqG2mCWFc5jnuCb0kP0nNyMpQpPQ6Ps8K1wiRr4KSvmDrYNMKyw7x9SQcphmNYy-42vWiSXu9tUTShGHcGX3HF1j0ibqVQexzTbNrjl6EqqZTjw4hyf_S51-DrRqEoPXDzikIlk3gv3sGajO-P3pd8k-rZUCc9NU_yFrAqfnTdxjaz-4NJuWPnFJP0AOsx-G0PQojQEBASZaWb26hy05fDAE_wiiWvI2dTbLzz) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: Throughout this race, we have worked together to take on the DC elites and share our conservative message with Wisconsin. Friend, Throughout this race, we have worked together to take on the DC elites and share our conservative message with Wisconsin. Over the last 11 months we’ve worked tirelessly in that pursuit, thousands of volunteer hours and emails...and all of it in pursuit of one very important day: Primary Day. And, Friend, that day is just one week — 7 DAYS— away now. In these final hours you can count on people to start showing their true colors. My opponent has been running misleading ads, smearing my record, and embracing every swamp tactic to divide conservatives before next Tuesday. But let’s not forget – our biggest opponent is Senator Baldwin. Baldwin has voted in line with Chuck Schumer and liberal radicals to obstruct the America First agenda WE voted for. She opposed tax reform, supports a complete government takeover of health care and let our veterans down at the Tomah VA! It’s easy to get distracted, but Friend, defeating Senator Baldwin is my real target. That’s why we just cannot afford to fail in this primary. I’ve talked closely with my team, and we’ve figured out that we need just $100,000 to push us full speed ahead through these final days. So, Friend, I need to ask you for a personal favor — This is our last chance, Friend. For the next seven days, we’re going to have to work harder than ever before to prepare. We need to be out in the field. We need ads on the radio, on TV and on digital. We need to be doing everything we can to get the word out when it matters most — so we can WIN and take on Baldwin in November. But, if we can raise $100,000 to maintain our momentum this week, we can and we WILL succeed. We’re running out of time. We need to come together NOW. I'm proud of the work we've done so far. Let's make it worth it by winning this primary next week. Time is critical, and I hope to hear back from you as soon as possible so we can beat Senator Baldwin together. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Peter Hanscom
subject: The RV is in the shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
If you're familiar with Joe's campaign, you're familiar with our RV -- our 16-year-old, Indiana-made RV that we've taken to every corner of the state this past year to talk to Hoosiers. |
---
| | Hey Peter -- If you're familiar with Joe's campaign, you're familiar with our RV -- our 16-year-old, Indiana-made RV that we've taken to every corner of the state this past year to talk to Hoosiers. Well, when you put as many miles across Indiana on an RV in 12 months as we have, a mechanical issue or two is all but inevitable, as we found out on Saturday.

We were on our way to Kimmell when we noticed that something wasn't right. Thankfully, a very kind farmer pulled over to help us out and generously offered to give us a ride to our next event. Joe, his wife Jill, and the team piled into the farmer's truck and off we went! **If that 's not Hoosier hospitality, I don't know what is.** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ff6/7377f838/3a4b64b6/51f9aa5a/1066387425/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-repair?refcode=20180807.2&amount=15")
---
We're not letting anything slow down our statewide tour. The RV is in the shop right now, but we haven't missed a beat, and it'll be back on the road in the next few days. **However, these RV repairs are expensive -- and they weren 't initially in our campaign budget -- so we're asking for your help.

Will you contribute to our RV repair fund today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ff6/7377f838/3a4b64b6/51f9aa55/1066387425/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-repair?express_lane=true&refcode=20180807.2&amount=10")**
****[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ff6/7377f838/3a4b64b6/51f9aa54/1066387425/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-repair?express_lane=true&refcode=20180807.2&amount=25")****
****[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ff6/7377f838/3a4b64b6/51f9aa57/1066387425/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-repair?express_lane=true&refcode=20180807.2&amount=50")****
****[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ff6/7377f838/3a4b64b6/51f9aa56/1066387425/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-repair?express_lane=true&refcode=20180807.2&amount=100")****
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ff6/7377f838/3a4b64b6/51f9aa51/1066387425/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-repair?refcode=20180807.2")****
The fact of the matter is that **Indiana could host the closest and priciest Senate race in the COUNTRY this year!** So if we're going to hold this seat and **advance our Democratic values** in the next Congress, we need your help to make it happen.

Thanks for your support and we'll see you on the road in our RV soon enough!

\-- Peter

subject: Take Gabby Giffords’ pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| **Take Gabby 's Pledge**

"I promise you that if we cannot make our communities safer from gun violence with the Congress we have now, I will vote this November for a different Congress, one that puts our communities ahead of the gun lobby." [ADD YOUR NAME](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/SkngK/6/Go/r5cs/619wrb/6rHGObMI1K/P/P "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/s/ars-enough?source=em171002-c")Activist - I know politicians fear the gun lobby.

But I also know that fear cannot compare to what those innocent children in Florida felt as the gunshots rang out, bullets flew through the halls of their school, and their teachers and classmates were gunned down.

Or the fear my constituents felt as a man fired his gun at my congressional event in a Safeway parking lot, shooting me point-blank in the head and killing six others.

The truth is, the epidemic levels of gun violence in this country will not stop until Congress demonstrates the courage to stand up to the gun lobby. The current Congress has not. So we must elect one that will. Join me in pledging you will:

[**Sign my pledge: "I promise you that if we cannot make our communities safer from gun violence with the Congress we have now, I will use every means available to make sure we have a different Congress, one that puts communities' interests ahead of the gun lobby."**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/SkngK/s/Go/r5cs/619wrb/z02Oj2LrXN/P/P) [ADD YOUR NAME](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/SkngK/v/Go/r5cs/619wrb/6NsNgnoVx8/P/P "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/s/ars-enough?source=em171002-c")When Congress knows they have more to fear from us than they do from the gun lobby, we'll get change. That's what adding your name is all about. Every day we fail to take action, we choose this fate. We tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge this crisis and vote against our safety. We let our gun violence epidemic continue day after deadly day.

This cycle has to end. And it will end... with us.

Add your name. Sign my pledge:

Sign my pledge: "I promise you that if we cannot make our communities safer from gun violence with the Congress we have now, I will vote this November for a different Congress, one that puts our communities ahead of the gun lobby." [ADD YOUR NAME](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/SkngK/z/Go/r5cs/619wrb/BHiVb79m3/P/P "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/s/ars-enough?source=em171002-c")When Congress knows they have more to fear from us than they do from the gun lobby, we'll get change. That's what adding your name is all about. All my best, Gabby Giffords

---

name: Paul Davis
subject: I’m not intimidated by a challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1_h_iPbE7I9DeBnLpranTFuvcPSPmRWzYxoRSgMpmcs=/LEBCoovT2DmpNWIyc7hSLduHoL3FiU_PoWOcqrLpA7Q=?gpsid=13_36_2695&refcode=em18_180807_pstPri_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180807_pstPri_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Last fall I decided to run for Congress because the dysfunction of Washington has spiraled out of control, and I couldn't sit back and do nothing. I've lived in Kansas all my life. It's where I learned to be a good neighbor, stand up for my community, and work together to solve problems. We need more of those Kansas values in Washington.

In the Kansas Legislature, I proved that I can bring both parties together to get things done. By building consensus and working across party lines, I helped pass a balanced budget, cut Kansas' property taxes, and fought back against Sam Brownback's repeated cuts to our public schools.

I'm ready to step up and fight for Kansas, but Steve Watkins and the Washington establishment are prepared to spend whatever it costs to protect their broken system. Out-of-state dark money is scheduled to start flowing into our district today -- and we know these groups won't hesitate to spread mistruths or ugly lies. But the last thing Kansas needs is another politician who just takes marching orders from dark money groups that funnel millions of dollars into their campaigns. We need independent leaders who will prioritize Kansas families over special interests.

**[I'm ready for change in D.C., and I know you are too. So please, chip in $5 or more now and let's keep the momentum going.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1_h_iPbE7I9DeBnLpranTFuvcPSPmRWzYxoRSgMpmcs=/LEBCoovT2DmpNWIyc7hSLduHoL3FiU_PoWOcqrLpA7Q=?gpsid=13_36_2695&refcode=em18_180807_pstPri_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180807_pstPri_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Paul

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/1_h_iPbE7I9DeBnLpranTFuvcPSPmRWzYxoRSgMpmcs=/LEBCoovT2DmpNWIyc7hSLduHoL3FiU_PoWOcqrLpA7Q=?gpsid=13_36_2695&refcode=em18_180807_pstPri_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180807_pstPri_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: will you co-sponsor my bill?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Too many families in Minnesota are hurting because of the rising cost of brand-name prescriptions. It's heartbreaking that it's one of the issues I hear about most often.

Bringing down prescription drug prices is one of my top priorities in the Senate. One of my bipartisan bills that could help is the Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act. This bill would crack down on a practice known as "pay for delay" where big brand-name pharmaceutical companies pay off generic manufacturers to keep less expensive products off the market. **Stopping this ridiculous practice would save taxpayers $2.9 billion.**

The prices of four out of the top ten drugs have gone up by 100 percent in the last few years.

**The Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act could help, but we need it to come up for a vote and public support will be critical to getting it passed. [**Will you show your support for lower prescription drug prices by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gl1Y8VyTeS9aXhxs7Z0mXYmaphbcJxEb)**
[**Add my name >>**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=G3f%2FLWbvXScwebL3cQgIJ4maphbcJxEb)

Thank you,
Amy

clean_body: Hi, Too many families in Minnesota are hurting because of the rising cost of brand-name prescriptions. It's heartbreaking that it's one of the issues I hear about most often. Bringing down prescription drug prices is one of my top priorities in the Senate. One of my bipartisan bills that could help is the Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act. This bill would crack down on a practice known as "pay for delay" where big brand-name pharmaceutical companies pay off generic manufacturers to keep less expensive products off the market. Stopping this ridiculous practice would save taxpayers $2.9 billion. The prices of four out of the top ten drugs have gone up by 100 percent in the last few years. The Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act could help, but we need it to come up for a vote and public support will be critical to getting it passed. Thank you, Amy

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Ivanka Trump’s message on American jobs
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 8, 2018
# **Ivanka Trump’s message on American jobs
**
******Ivanka Trump is visiting Illinois today,** joining a discussion with residents and local lawmakers on the importance of President Donald J. Trump’s workforce initiative. Ms. Trump laid out her goal for the program in a recent Wall Street Journal op-ed: to “fill American jobs with American workers.” **“The assembly line,** energy plant and retail store have changed dramatically in the past 25 years—and the jobs have, too,” she writes. “Such rapid change is one reason 6.6 million U.S. jobs are currently unfilled.” **The White House is leading the charge.** Rather than implementing burdensome regulations that only end up costing us jobs, President Trump is creating the right conditions for an economic boom. In addition to lowering taxes on American businesses, his [ _Pledge to America’s Workers_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/pledge-to-americas-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) —signed by more and more great organizations each day—is delivering millions of opportunities for career growth. **President Trump is helping working families** with their expenses at home, too. Last week, the Administration announced a new rule that grants customers greater access to affordable health insurance policies. “They are an excellent option for people who are relatively healthy but can’t afford to pay for [_an outrageously priced Obamacare plan_ ,](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/haskins-trumps-new-short-term-health-insurance-rule-major-victory-young-people-working-families/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)” Justin Haskins of the Heartland Institute writes. [_Ivanka Trump: Training for the jobs of tomorrow_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/training-jobs-tomorrow/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **The Pledge:**[_As the economy booms, it’s time to stand up for workers._](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/economy-booms-time-pledge-americas-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# **More than 700,000 overstayed U.S. visas**
******Yesterday, the Department of Homeland Security** released its “Entry/Exit Overstay Report” for the 2017 fiscal year. The report provides information on departures and overstays for foreign visitors to the United States who entered as nonimmigrants. **There were 52,656,022** such nonimmigrant admissions to America last fiscal year, according to DHS. Of this number, DHS calculated a total overstay rate of 1.33 percent—or 701,900 overstay events. **The Administration is enforcing overstay violations** through a range of actions, including improving entry-and-exit data, notifying visitors of an impending expiration, cancelling authorizations and visas for violators, and apprehending overstays present in the United States. **This new information comes** as a growing number of Democrats call to abolish U.S. Immigrations and Customs Enforcement entirely. “To the great and brave men and women of ICE, do not worry or lose your spirit. You are doing a fantastic job,” President Trump said recently**.** [_Get the facts: Abolishing ICE would have devastating consequences._](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/abolishing-ice-erase-americas-borders-open-floodgates-crime-drugs-terrorism/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **In-depth:** [_See the full Entry/Exit Overstay Report from DHS._](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.dhs.gov/news/2018/08/07/dhs-releases-fiscal-year-2017-entryexit-overstay-report)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**Ivanka Trump at a Pledge to America’s Workers event at the White House. **|**** July 19, 2018****
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA4LjkzNDYyMzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwOC45MzQ2MjMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY3MDEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: add your name here:

body:
Hey Peter -- Did you see my team's message about our bill that's headed to the President? I need as many names as possible to mount public pressure to ensure that we give our veterans the care and support they deserve. [**Add your name now to protect veterans and expand their benefits ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RK0hgFC9aWa4EUegNKOeifPM5FmYrT-zdwLyQCpj6lU=/ftvDM1p8I_V9sxENoq7Qe0j0E0HBxaucbv3GyX9UcNo=)

[**I need your name to make sure that veterans can access the benefits they deserve.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RK0hgFC9aWa4EUegNKOeifPM5FmYrT-zdwLyQCpj6lU=/ftvDM1p8I_V9sxENoq7Qe0j0E0HBxaucbv3GyX9UcNo=)

**Begin forwarded message:**

> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RK0hgFC9aWa4EUegNKOeifPM5FmYrT-zdwLyQCpj6lU=/BAaKVJ7y-DwLJvv3aJUJFsI36M3rqRPlGKsS9LsPP5k=)
>
> Hey Peter,
>
> Dan has been busy up on the Hill, so we wanted to give you a quick update and a chance to voice your opinion. Just this month, Dan's bipartisan bill to expand veterans' benefits passed the House and Senate, and is now awaiting the president's signature.
>
> [**Tell Donald Trump: Your job is to protect those who serve our country, and signing Dan 's bill is the way to do that ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RK0hgFC9aWa4EUegNKOeifPM5FmYrT-zdwLyQCpj6lU=/anj24OET9KEVdGY0l6mNJrCD1zNWVQxbo_DpjPb3cAE=)
>
> Dan's bill would ensure access to commissaries and other on-base facilities to all veterans with a service-connected disability, Medal of Honor recipients, former prisoners of war, and veteran caregivers. For those who have given so much for our country, this is the least we can do to appreciate their sacrifice.
>
> A report from the Department of Defense even shows that expanding access to these services would not only improve the quality of life for veterans, but would also strengthen the commissary and exchange system.
>
> **[It's important to veterans everywhere that this bill passes, and that's why we need you. Add your name: tell the President to pass Dan's bill and protect veterans.](https://act.myngp.com/el/RK0hgFC9aWa4EUegNKOeifPM5FmYrT-zdwLyQCpj6lU=/anj24OET9KEVdGY0l6mNJrCD1zNWVQxbo_DpjPb3cAE=)**

name: Ben Jealous
subject: In Maryland, the 1% is winning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Larry Hogan is leaving us behind.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ab96/7ab0e2c4/7fc413a7/349b2243/2609108751/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-equal-economy?source=OHQ08088A") Friend, Larry Hogan would have you believe he's the voice of working families, but it turns out he's only the voice of the 1% -- and he's leaving everyone else behind. Last month, the Bureau of Economic Activity (BEA) released a report that found that the growth of Maryland's economy has stalled. We're now far behind our neighbors in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and D.C. -- during the longest boom in economic history. Not only that, a recent report from the Economic Policy Institute shows that more than half of the gains Marylanders did get went to the top 1%. **Income inequality is growing here in Maryland, and we have to do more to stop it. Larry Hogan is spinning my proposals at "pie in the sky" while accepting corporate money hand-over-fist and ignoring working-class families.** [**Add your name if you're ready to build a stronger economy in Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ab96/7ab0e2c4/7fc413a7/349b2243/2609108751/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-equal-economy?source=OHQ08088A") | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ab96/7ab0e2c4/7fc413a7/349b2243/2609108751/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-equal-economy?source=OHQ08088A")
---
The report from the BEA shows that Pennsylvania, Virginia, and D.C. are growing more than 2% across the board, while we've only grown 1.5%. Couple that with the news that Maryland lost 5,500 jobs in June, and suddenly Larry Hogan's promise to put more money in Marylanders' pockets is looking pretty weak.
And we can't ignore the disparity between white and black folks in Baltimore -- a report last year showed that the median household income for African-Americans in Baltimore is nearly half that of whites -- $33,801 to $62,751.
Larry Hogan likes to say "Maryland is open for business." But you have to ask _who_ he's opening it for. Working-class families are hurting, black families most of all.
Who do you stand for, Larry? The corporations you're accepting checks from, or the working-class families your policies are leaving behind?
I know who I will stand for, every single day, as your next governor of Maryland. No more empty promises -- Maryland will be open for business, and open for equal opportunity.
[**If you're ready for a strong and equal economy that works for everyone, add your name today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ab96/7ab0e2c4/7fc413a7/349b2243/2609108751/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/strong-equal-economy?source=OHQ08088A")
Thanks,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ab96/7ab0e2c4/7fc413a7/349b2242/2609108751/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ08088Ab")
---

* * *

name: Bredesen for Senate
subject: 90 days left.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Hey Peter --
In the last few months, we’ve had a lot happen in this race, so I wanted to give you a quick recap:
1. Last week, Phil Bredesen won the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate, and the polls continue to show our message of working together to get things done for all Tennesseans is resonating with voters.

2. We’ve opened grassroots offices across the state as Governor Bredesen keeps his focus on issues that matter most to Tennesseans, like health care and jobs.

3. Our opponent’s “Death Star” is on its way, with millions of dollars in negative attacks -- as promised by their top strategist who was recently recorded saying they’ll win this race by inflicting **“death by 10,000 cuts”** against Governor Bredesen and threatening to **“constantly punch him in his face... over and over and over again.”**

But here’s the biggest takeaway -- **we have the momentum. The Washington establishment isn’t happy about it. And they’re going to do whatever it takes to drag this race into the mud.**
[**Can you add a contribution of $10 to our campaign so we can build on our momentum and keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1851518/9745073/1709422619?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzVlMzIxNi0zOTliLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmhNIAq5il1_Tj3blwZW0QhSvX7-TrAUhVVvFA9LB7g=&refcode=em180808-90days-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10)
**[Donate today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1851519/9745074/1709422619?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzVlMzIxNi0zOTliLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmhNIAq5il1_Tj3blwZW0QhSvX7-TrAUhVVvFA9LB7g=&refcode=em180808-90days-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10)**
Every day, we are proving to the Washington establishment that a campaign focused on Tennessee is how we’ll win. **But we can’t afford to take anything for granted.**
We can win this thing, but only if we come together, stay focused on Tennessee, and keep up our momentum.
Thanks for all you do,
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen 2018
**[Donate today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1851520/9745075/1709422619?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzVlMzIxNi0zOTliLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmhNIAq5il1_Tj3blwZW0QhSvX7-TrAUhVVvFA9LB7g=&refcode=em180808-90days-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10)**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Let's chat! Coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Friend, Sitting down with folks for a cup of coffee started as a way to connect with voters. But it has become so much more. Conversations over coffee with so many different North Carolinians at their neighborhood coffee shop or diner has become a treasured regular tradition on the campaign trail. They tell me about their experiences, their concerns, the things they talk about over coffee or dinner with their own families. I'm always honored by their willingness to share their stories with me, and every day, they remind me why this campaign is so important. | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d2/e3b7d3/5c0c7570/2555147a/3873196033/VEsH/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180806b")
---
Whether it's young families stressing about the rising costs of education and childcare, workers concerned about stagnant wages, or retirees worried about cuts to Social Security and Medicare, I am honored to hear their stories. The more I listen, the more I know they need someone who will fight for every family in this district.
I want to know what issues are most important to you too -- what do you talk about with your family over coffee? [**Let me know and I 'll be sure to read your response.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d2/e3b7d3/5c0c7570/2555147a/3873196033/VEsE/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180806b")
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d2/e3b7d3/5c0c7570/2555147a/3873196033/VEsF/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180806b")
---
I got into this race because I believe families in the 13th District deserve someone better to stand up for them -- their jobs, their health care, and their security. With your help, I'll be able to do just that.
I look forward to reading [**your response**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d2/e3b7d3/5c0c7570/2555147a/3873196033/VEsC/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180806b") -- and I hope to talk about it with you over coffee someday.
Thank you,
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: wanted to send you a note, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Hey Peter, Dan Torres here, Zephyr's campaign manager. I wanted to send a note to a few supporters, including you, ahead of tomorrow's campaign finance deadline.
Zephyr set a goal for our campaign to generate as many individual contributions in a week as all of our opponents had collectively at the last deadline. But right now, we're a bit short of where we need to be.
Can you make your first donation to our campaign? We're running a people-powered campaign, so every donation matters. Here's the link:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780efd/6e822e2f/1a3fa3eb/41724578/2412653131/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180808-1-full")**
Our opponents rely on corporate interests and the one percent to fund their campaigns. We've rejected corporate money. Instead, we depend on you because we know that's how we will win. Right now that means we need you to help us hit this goal.
Thanks for making all of this possible.
All my best,
Dan Torres

* * *

Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780efd/6e822e2f/1a3fa3eb/41724579/2412653131/VEsE/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780efd/6e822e2f/1a3fa3eb/4172457a/2412653131/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").
clean_body: Hey Peter, Dan Torres here, Zephyr's campaign manager. I wanted to send a note to a few supporters, including you, ahead of tomorrow's campaign finance deadline. Zephyr set a goal for our campaign to generate as many individual contributions in a week as all of our opponents had collectively at the last deadline. But right now, we're a bit short of where we need to be. Can you make your first donation to our campaign? We're running a people-powered campaign, so every donation matters. Here's the link: "" Our opponents rely on corporate interests and the one percent to fund their campaigns. We've rejected corporate money. Instead, we depend on you because we know that's how we will win. Right now that means we need you to help us hit this goal. Thanks for making all of this possible. All my best, Dan Torres * Paid for by Zephyr for NY 1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

name: Ryan Furlong, tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Pence and Trump are trying to turn Minnesota red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Let's show him grassroots progressives can defeat big donors.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a571/c1f7015/6a9c3124/11419b6d/3602717707/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180808_em-B") Friends, today Mike Pence is in Duluth raising money for Minnesota Republicans. He's at a big dollar fundraiser where he's asking folks to give thousands of dollars to turn Minnesota red. This is his second visit to the state, and it coincides with a GOP dark money organization launching a $50,000 ad buy against Tina. It's clear the White House has made Minnesota a top target in 2018 -- and is using every resource to defeat Tina. **It has never been more critical to show everyone watching that grassroots progressives are ready to take on Trump, Pence, and all the money they are going to spend.** **[**Will you rus** h an urgent contribution of $5 to support Tina's campaign and show that progressives are ready to take on Trump and Pence? We have to win this seat to take back the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a571/c1f7015/6a9c3124/11419b6d/3602717707/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180808_em-B")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a571/c1f7015/6a9c3124/11419b6d/3602717707/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180808_em-B")** Trump and Pence know that Tina will take on their agenda and not back down an inch. That's why they are going all-in to defeat her. Let's show them we're fighting back. Ryan Furlong
Communications Director **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a571/c1f7015/6a9c3124/11419b6d/3602717707/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180808_em-B")**

subject: Tom Emmer is on the edge of his seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Tom Emmer is increasing his spending!

Friends,

It looks like the work we are doing is paying off. Our volunteers are reaching voters, and our Town Halls are getting people engaged. As we come closer to the election, Tom Emmer has started increasing his spending.

The good news is that Tom Emmer is concerned about November, the bad news is he is sitting on nearly $1 Million. We need your help (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=8aug&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=bf856a07e5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_08_03_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-bf856a07e5-9291445) to keep up the pace and raise the money we need to Get Out the Vote.

Thank you so much for helping us get to this point, your support has helped us rally our base of supporters, and show up wherever we are needed. A donation of $50 today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=8aug&amount=50&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=bf856a07e5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_08_03_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-bf856a07e5-9291445) will keep us on track, and keep Emmer on the defensive.

Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=8aug&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=bf856a07e5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_08_03_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-bf856a07e5-9291445)
Before you head off to donate (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=8aug&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=bf856a07e5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_08_03_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-bf856a07e5-9291445) , look who Ian ran into at Farmfest yesterday! It is always great to run into Gov. Dayton, especially out in the farming community.

subject: Another big endorsement!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friend,

I'm proud to be endorsed for my re-election by the National Right to Life today for my 100% pro-life voting record, including my vote to defund Planned Parenthood.

See what they had to say about why they endorsed my campaign:

I look forward to continue working to protect the sanctity of human life in Congress!

This past week, our campaign was also proudly endorsed by Indiana Farm Bureau ELECT PAC. Agriculture is very important to our district, and I'm excited to continue to be a leader and voice for our district’s farmers in my second term!

For Indiana,

Jim

body:
If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a....
Friend, in less than one week, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country.

You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not.

If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate.

Let's just be honest. I’m the only candidate in this race who what it takes to defeat a swamp-dwelling elitist like Tammy Baldwin. That means: if we lose, Republicans could lose the majority.

That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We just can't afford to lose!

That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this primary.
[6 DAYS TO GO: CHIP IN $6](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1He6pcnxJalPzikxAZrhSMwUqrVYULPWmY4NqIDc46Qm0Iam4KsMVjSrj9eZs4jyHIomL6IbA3jd3Fw3VPlB9ri0CPaNZLMl4zdN-rxZoa14jKHq6O2DxxKXr3q1RKd4hx68ifI8-sxam_MMmaqLrQqTseU6oRQDIU0aRoJxsCjQOmHHQ4xwtMQ9Jx-b_z7AMT1EYT6zotmhBHyYJJGE7mLdOSmMsO_3MBpr8c_v4527OVK809-59BFq6cINm40PS1hGHlMmo_PwLAI4OtnsY0YL5VD_iO4DRXwM8PllUX66AKmUzhbBK6IQ0IzP0TKqSKMAVUwJGRrFbTuxSZ2iF26HKrwEQnWThGaMayt3dTiL3ESQU9z0D8zd_gOh2eXNESmzSNyxXA0mp7WxeM8Djn4%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=RlS5m3r5pnNY2FTgtz88xwPxXb0uua4PykEjGoxKu747hso4t_SdagDmRJWmPZ_b2wlUB_xyiFUwsuLS_XuwZ6V7VSaZQiscZCnod9cLRFQYe0YPD5bUEq3-8dNPLLYOPBG2yxkuOQiFzqQP8eHR69VAOH2tPKJwQ9bdDinlWZk6yrjCDy9LoeSyN-ca2lnODSozZXD-l0lA2AkAjYmJDHvs7Wxq1_RXMHZ4e5MBBHpda_mimREYRd4tNhWiZKpE). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1Gz3X0U3B0IO8RazIu1iPITKZr8eM_49vlyqVnXzvz-0SCy6fjF9fpnr9IpmCW8qPHRex409UtEQZrxxXrYAsvgg4kxVw_SGPO-TCAGnu77Vzhw6O23x0SiLm1-bb9EDuaBTH6FWKHnemHQVdEX289MHe9-jIb2nZzBpVKenFCvkr6-ehvNJUURtwbZFZeRKf31sVok_UGINp9hbww_Xr6ZcXeaOnshmoSBtaa4IMRCrFQD4lownvGRifZUDLFcAy43C028HcfzYjlhTYgLFkqL0a2-DkXFH8XAWZqrTU-GQe_GdPF_u0wfmOvRQ_gv66SnIuxEvQWA_81NPHVE_OVsoWcd0MgMNk_IXUAskkITR) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1Gz3X0U3B0IO8RazIu1iPISdGLUD3LuOwCgZZ6n_LfI4XJznVbi_5953Eqgdb04mc6pmLWcBqOjRmEyYyuC1rnSAJNGO495-D-YYnC4k5JUuVt5oCTAi0WzX0BKXhLgyOTwm-dPVw6hznGtOwli01faY2jCTLlLTcACA7NWyUUu5ooLKuWscm84fP_5ggPF2s8w3pRYQJX2wPxqTDc4Pm7QWBrfsn0YvbVxNK2vdlooqQEahgSXX42gK64raknkfPTwGvny2FN6WQyYdgVzcNkuv7ZVlNqGGBLVvmw3ssUAtwk19mfShe6uObsperNfAJN3nwAmo6Mmsw98gTc0sYBlKBiDCFwycSw3ewloLm6uU) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1Ml-8aVEEziv3iMnoSfs4LHFoGwjQg1XyFH2YjRMLzGVDkxLth3riztsuIyNye35f0EANP3wHj9LZ3wpawFxnT9eG05MdT2XXByHpeo8aUDPhNPo7MA1kpOFtFFMfRe3zpsD4gOcXnl6L1mToIaAvulQlgwyFDWYk-_4bg536ePc9cZ1Rg5Wgk5Be_l5LU666-_p-QwO-zXRhFctJQD9yvnwBbBvbcpinhhH4vdLwMDdEOfmhFOo3rEvHpaaS14FvQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1LOLFJClu0O2yhBzgghfxj952ab65heCDDCPns7RpmrDD8YbNNKRN_IDY7_hUy7-vStc74xRXrHQ9nxOZDP4OhIH7Lsqym1bPdmejBp-Quj9Dv9lr8-n2W7fLOEn6E5sy9BAmyxpNsrVmG7lzKZfW2nInDOdx_uxQtYezaK7I3upzUGbsH6LlIpVe2URMvxaTL4-IIzI1sSv2RMEluH8_doyLtlRMZtDRnrwO7IXRCGMe2IhWtSNhqpfcdGFWmAD_g%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1OG1lD16L7m5TLT2s6fiUi4Lk3WlW-NerF_CIDNzmPeQd4BxRgkQiveGb_MX4s9zVBQE3F1h24zo6So7Yo-z1ZaL9tE8kRtLEJ04GGf8wjsT9zw4TPZc0g2SFMiD_A9SwoFLt06gO9nezRMIXylEwnJcLiW3ROVuRPF11FiwpCkRiQrQQVJDGhAuGtVQHnVztzyMAkDL6L-2iNyBNkBHAH0f2X5X31xHYhhtcOqyy3Wtfn95Fx0ICQ7oqpzMaYE6Fw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=jNnFsI01Me6pU9Rb62kU1Gz3X0U3B0IO8RazIu1iPIR2Ydr5ISH-uQz7hS43BL9qrqBlBkB0lrq_FsrIQer6eL0a9pLmv2wirxKvePRkkH0IsXNr0syskcOLLBHrR8IxN1tii1U_Lwel1C6T1t7cBbk6qzNJmkcVV1ByrCUtBA7muqWVwBaMRMs5MPnrRjCkLeGTWudKLvuZpsunICUBpS1R_wz0EyCZx5FgHzraXdKO7NZRaXPozEoYBY4TXTdM1DFr3AuY4Fh5F28Lcu5KsNMokxGFBly-Azus66xZ3xkEhJgTIvvv4k5sGSBu233-wOVWYnlhYQ5UVr9NLAhudG1wBUkTrFPmt4HRDZG816iPNHYoLcHDrF9K84EECsB8hzmEzbAD95Hw5LHFxjGW8g%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=RlS5m3r5pnNY2FTgtz88xwPxXb0uua4PykEjGoxKu747hso4t_SdagDmRJWmPZ_b2wlUB_xyiFUwsuLS_XuwZ6V7VSaZQiscZCnod9cLRFQYe0YPD5bUEq3-8dNPLLYOPBG2yxkuOQiFzqQP8eHR69VAOH2tPKJwQ9bdDinlWZk6yrjCDy9LoeSyN-ca2lnODSozZXD-l0lA2AkAjYmJDHvs7Wxq1_RXMHZ4e5MBBHpda_mimREYRd4tNhWiZKpE) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6083dfd481aa4e74b0b43fc9e01e261f&_e=RlS5m3r5pnNY2FTgtz88xwPxXb0uua4PykEjGoxKu747hso4t_SdagDmRJWmPZ_b2wlUB_xyiFUwsuLS_XuwZ6V7VSaZQiscZCnod9cLRFQYe0YPD5bUEq3-8dNPLLYOPBG2yxkuOQiFzqQP8eHR69VAOH2tPKJwQ9bdDinlWZk6yrjCDy9LoeSyN-ca2lnODSozZXD-l0lA2AkAjYmJDHvs7Wxq1_RXMHZ4e5MBBHpda_mimREYRd4tNhWiZKpE) to unsubscribe. clean_body: If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a.... Friend, in less than one week, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country. You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not. If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate. Let's just be honest. I’m the only candidate in this race who what it takes to defeat a swamp-dwelling elitist like Tammy Baldwin. That means: if we lose, Republicans could lose the majority. That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We just can't afford to lose! That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this primary. I know we're coming down to the wire now, friend. Just 6 days left. If you can chip in today to help us raise $100,000, we'll be one step closer to victory. Now is NOT the time to back down, friend. Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until next Tuesday. I am counting on you. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

_Summer’s heating up and so is our race._

**With under 100 days to go until Election Day, Team Pence has kicked the campaign into high gear.**

Throughout July, we visited county fairs in nearly every county and had conversations with countless Hoosiers about how I’ll fight for our shared Hoosier values and support the Trump-Pence agenda.

**[Curious about where our campaign traveled this past month? [ **Watch the video** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a1174b31f89144758c64c86218767ac7&_e=jXmzX99A15Voed7MhfYlME11mPC2yh85SczUvxcal9tjOU1lKe_8cJcDfibbyULU9JKL6cfH-eZo1MkEc-4ce0bMnvQdqXjDqZdqyfi_caCiAGY_F2EL7VtM15eJuHVcefNjPAeZIXsNNiuvE1CM32sfpRjEkFfDPFOCXuFQDFJ_W46E8zWASRnyW5UFXEl6VvbVjbDNUHCYpRUh3WMTYv1-WxCx6C-q1Sm0-SagkLyMz0zuU3XzXLIH-1ihanTCJ9ZOVYdwCwFsxKXZyrZK_fnBRpwnGpWmOXM9VlcgRfIKgggU5Ltdu9slp8VCjFz_MCJejYUaAxgsiacU3K2Tgwdb9OBQDn5EQPh-RmuOu4z0OxVgWZzWIS0j8zDuv3b44dD5s8O19a13AMtRSBoCbRg_fjRgsbHs1ywWcNej4w7SNUM0Tq2Yy52QC6Koy6de)

Greg Pence

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Why I am shocked:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This is important. Senate Republicans are blocking millions in election security funds, and I need your help to change their minds.

Read more below, or if you've heard enough, [**add your name here to urge Republicans to act immediately on election security.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6f8/43d8135f/60439dbe/5100d9dd/2109768396/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/election-security?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+add+your+name+here+to+urge+Republicans+t&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1")

* * *

Last week, I appeared on MSNBC to sound the alarm about election security in our country.

We have to recognize that Russia and other foreign adversaries are serious about compromising our election infrastructure. And they won't stop there -- they are also targeting our energy grids and transportation systems.

**That 's why I'm shocked Senate Republicans blocked an additional $250 million in election security funding recently. We have not done enough to prepare for attacks by foreign hackers, and this type of inaction is dangerous for our democracy.**
**[DEMAND ACTION>>](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6f8/43d8135f/60439dbe/5100d9dc/2109768396/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/election-security?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DEMAND+ACTION+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1")** **Americans will begin casting their general election votes in under two months, including right here in New Mexico. The time to secure our elections is now.**

[**I 'm saying enough is enough, and I hope you will join me. Will you tell Senate Republicans that the time to act on election security is now, not later? Add your name here to be one of the 10,000 I need in the next 48 hours ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6f8/43d8135f/60439dbe/5100d9df/2109768396/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/election-security?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Irsquom+saying+enough+is+enough+and+I+ho&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180808_1_1")

Thank you for standing with me on this critical issue,

Martin

Read more below, or if you've heard enough, "" Last week, I appeared on MSNBC to sound the alarm about election security in our country. We have to recognize that Russia and other foreign adversaries are serious about compromising our election infrastructure. And they won't stop there -- they are also targeting our energy grids and transportation systems. That 's why I'm shocked Senate Republicans blocked an additional $250 million in election security funding recently. We have not done enough to prepare for attacks by foreign hackers, and this type of inaction is dangerous for our democracy. "" Americans will begin casting their general election votes in under two months, including right here in New Mexico. The time to secure our elections is now. Here are just a few examples of the price we pay for McClintock's bad leadership:
* **$6.7 million** in lost tourist revenue from Yosemite closures, thanks to McClintock's vote to shut down the government

* McClintock's votes to undermine our healthcare have led to a **9% rise in healthcare costs** in our district which equates to:
* A 40-year-old individual paying $1,030 more per year
* A family of four paying $3,270 more
* A 55-year-old couple paying $3,590 more

* **$300 billion cut** from Social Security, addiction treatment, veterans benefits, and student loan programs and **$537 billion cut from Medicare** to pay for the tax bill McClintock supported

* **$1.9 trillion** increase in our deficit due to McClintock's vote for the tax bill

As we count the dollars that McClintock's votes cost us, we're also counting on you.
[_**Jessica is ready to fight for common-sense economic decisions that keep us out of debt and support middle-class families, seniors and small businesses to keep our economy thriving. Chip in $25 now and let 's get her elected. **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/vkdnaHRIq8dVjKBiI8LR7DddYX5CO9qIU-4ot_8Ynhw=/tdCNH04la-Fu-yzDzv4_-14bTTIMiy3wL7F-AhqkfG4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180808_KH_aug90days_all_l1&amount=25)

Kim

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Fighting the Opioid Crisis
body:
The opiate crisis is one of the most significant challenges we face. It shows no bias towards the rich or poor, young or old, urban or rural. |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c59d86288d&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4b9d298b9e&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8fc6ba7647&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7ec732d711&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=69e6f9739d&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=69e6f9739d&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| **Fighting the Opioid Crisis**
In his inaugural address Governor Phil Scott made clear:

**_“The opiate crisis is one of the most significant challenges we face. It shows no bias towards the rich or poor, young or old, urban or rural. This epidemic touches nearly every Vermont family. And for too long, it has stolen the lives of those suffering from addiction, and any sense of peace from those of us who love them.”_**

Since then Governor Scott, working with members of the legislature, has worked tirelessly to enact reforms, expand programs and secure funding to present a united front against this epidemic.

Here are some highlights of those efforts.

Created, by Executive Order, the Opioid Coordination Council and the Director of Drug Abuse Prevention, to ensure state agencies are working together to help reduce opiate abuse, aid those in recovery, and strengthen our laws against dangerous drug dealers.
* Worked with the Secretary of State to cut through red tape in order to increase the number of practicing, licensed treatment professionals around the state.

* Worked with community partners, the Agency of Human Services, and members of the legislature to expedite the opening of a treatment center in St. Albans, which helped eliminate the waiting list for treatment in the region.

* Directed the Department of Labor to **place Employment Councilors in treatment centers to help those active in recovery to transition back into the workforce.**

* **Cracked down on dealers.** We’ve made more than 200 arrests for those distributing and selling narcotics including heroin, thanks to Vermont’s Drug Task Force.

* Worked to establish Drug Take Back sites in every Vermont State Police barracks. Collecting nearly 20,000lbs of unused prescription drugs, ensuring they stay off the streets.

* **This problem requires a focus,** which means the Administration will continue to invest in prevention, treatment and recovery - with greater access to education and intervention. **To be clear, the Governor does not support safe injection sites. Especially, when better treatments exist and available resources need to be prioritized. **

**We’ve made real progress, but there’s so much work to do**. We must ensure we’re doing all we can to prevent Substance Use Disorder, treat those that are affected, help them recover and transition back into independence, and make sure those who are selling and dealing are caught.

I know that with compassion, perseverance, and the strength of all Vermonters, we will continue to lead the nation in addressing this challenge.
---
| -Team Scott
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f89d0a7c7b&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=83783bf67c&e=19cebfe173)
---

---

P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=69e6f9739d)

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: you deserve a seat at the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa977/34a064cc/abcd2a6/70e905e/1639205747/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends -- Stacey's interview on _The Daily Show_ was a reminder of why we're all in this fight. When Trevor Noah asked about her strategy to turn out voters in communities generally ignored by politicians, this is what Stacey had to say: _" I have an opponent who is a remarkable architect of voter suppression. My mission is to tell folks he doesn't matter. You do. Your right to vote is yours and I'm going to give you a reason to use it."_ And that's exactly what we're doing. We are meeting Georgians where they are -- in their communities -- and letting them know that their voices do matter. That they deserve a seat at the table. **But running a voter outreach operation this extensive isn 't cheap. We have less than three months to reach out to every single Georgian. So I'm asking:** **[Can I count on you to make a donation to help fund our voter outreach program today? This is important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa977/34a064cc/abcd2a6/70e905f/1639205747/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODA4MTgtYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE080818-b")** -- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
\---original message---
Friends - Last night, Stacey went on _The Daily Show with Trevor Noah_ to talk about her bold strategy to win this campaign: **Hear for yourself! Watch the interview:** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa977/34a064cc/abcd2a6/70e905c/1639205747/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODA4MTgtYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-dailyshow?refcode=IE080818-b") Stacey's parents were activists during the civil rights movement, and they raised her and her siblings to revere the right to vote. That's a message Stacey carries with her as she crisscrosses the state in this campaign. It's also exactly how we're going to win -- by talking to every single Georgian, _especially_ in communities that have largely been ignored by politicians, and those who are the least likely to be asked to vote. We're talking to those voters because we know their vote matters -- because they have a _stake_ in the decision-making process. Pundits ask us all the time how we plan to make headway in a traditionally red state in the Deep South. It's simple: **We are going to give people a reason to use their right to vote. That 's our strategy. And it's how we're going to win.** **[Watch Stacey's appearance on _The Daily Show with Trevor Noah_ here.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa977/34a064cc/abcd2a6/70e905c/1639205747/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODA4MTgtYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-dailyshow?refcode=IE080818-b")** -- Team Abrams

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Here's how our women did last night:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c486a/24c69fd9/262bb68d2/1884b46d/212991298/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFET22N_digital_email_20180808_Aug7Reportback_inact&source=WQEFET22N_digital_email_20180808_Aug7Reportback_inact")
---

Peter,

Last night was one of our biggest primary election nights since Super Tuesday.

We had 33 pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot in four states, and so far, 30 of them have won!

Here's a closer look:
* **Senate:** All three of our Senate women -- **Debbie Stabenow** (MI), **Claire McCaskill** (MO), and **Maria Cantwell** (WA) -- won their primary elections and are now one step closer to winning re-election.

* **House:** Five of our candidates won last night and move on to face off against Republicans in the general election, including **Sharice Davids** (KS-03), who would be one of the first Native American women in Congress and the first openly gay member of the Kansas congressional delegation.

* **Governor:** Both of our candidates won last night in Michigan and Kansas and can flip governors' seats in states Trump won in 2016.

* **State & Local:** Twenty of our candidates running for state and local office won, including 2017 Rising Star nominee **Nicole Galloway** , who is running to hold her seat as Missouri state auditor.

These wins wouldn't have been possible without this community supporting our candidates when they needed it most.

I'm so proud of what we accomplished together last night, but we need to keep up the momentum!

We had 33 pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot in four states, and so far, 30 of them have won! Here's a closer look: Senate: All three of our Senate women -- Debbie Stabenow (MI), Claire McCaskill (MO), and Maria Cantwell (WA) -- won their primary elections and are now one step closer to winning re-election. House: Five of our candidates won last night and move on to face off against Republicans in the general election, including Sharice Davids (KS-03), who would be one of the first Native American women in Congress and the first openly gay member of the Kansas congressional delegation. Governor: Both of our candidates won last night in Michigan and Kansas and can flip governors' seats in states Trump won in 2016. State & Local: Twenty of our candidates running for state and local office won, including 2017 Rising Star nominee Nicole Galloway , who is running to hold her seat as Missouri state auditor. These wins wouldn't have been possible without this community supporting our candidates when they needed it most. name: From the desk of DWS
subject: Blue or Pink, we need to keep fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Women are leading the charge against Donald Trump and Republicans in these midterm elections. Hours after Trump took the oath of office, it was women who marched on Washington by the m
|
---
| | **_"The wave that 's building for November may not be blue so much as pink"_**
\-- _The Washington Post_ ; 7/30/2018 Women are leading the charge against Donald Trump and Republicans in these midterm elections. Hours after Trump took the oath of office, it was women who marched on Washington by the millions -- and I was proud to be there. | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f6f/622b7b5b/1c27b9c7/307b97e1/3991536246/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180808?refcode=dwse180808_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
We did it again this year, and plans are already underway for next year's Women's March.
And women will change the course of history this November. According to a report in the _Washington Post_ , women are running for office in record numbers. We're contributing to political campaigns in record numbers. We're even more enthusiastic to vote than men. If we keep this up, there will be no stopping us in November.
**But whether the upcoming wave is blue or pink, we need to make sure it sweeps Democrats into the House majority. It's the only way we can truly secure women's rights for good.**
[_**We have 20 days left until the Florida Primary and only 91 left until the General Election. Let's make the most of every single one of them. If you can, rush in a contribution and help boost our grassroots efforts.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f6f/622b7b5b/1c27b9c7/307b97e1/3991536246/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180808?refcode=dwse180808_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
I won't stop fighting President Trump and the radical GOP agenda. I hope I can count on you to keep fighting beside me.
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: Shailene Woodley, Our Revolution
subject: More progressive victories -- we can't stop now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Rashida Tlaib won in MI-13, James Thompson won in KS-04, and Prop A was defeated in Missouri thanks to progressive voters like you.
#
**[BREAKING NEWS]**

**Friends, take a quick look at these incredible results:** Rashida Tlaib won in MI-13, James Thompson won in KS-04, and Prop A was defeated in Missouri thanks to progressive voters like you.
**Want to be part of making sure Rashida and James win on November 6? You can:**
**[DONATE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e73/3947947075/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-candidates?refcode=em180808-full")**
Friends,
The polls have closed, and it's safe to say: **progressives are making history.**
Last night's victories belong to you. Our Revolution members and local groups have spent the past year revolutionizing their neighborhoods by organizing around the policies that will make a material difference in our lives.
**That organizing helped to save unions in Missouri by defeating Right to Work.** Eleven Our Revolution candidates won primaries and are ready to take public office in November to champion the cause of racial, social, economic, and environmental justice.
**These campaigns are just getting started. Chip in to help Our Revolution elect these progressives and fight for working families across the country.**
**[DONATE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e73/3947947075/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-candidates?refcode=em180808-full")**
Last night's victories are just the start. **It's not just Rashida Tlaib and James Thompson.** Adrian Plank, Curtis Wylde, Michela Skelton, George Hanna, Jessa Lewis, Erin Frasier, Victor Minjares, and Mark Bignell also won, ensuring our progressive platform is represented in races for state house, state senate, and county prosecutor. But we need to keep fighting through November.
From young people, those paying off their debt, to workers making less than $15 an hour and living without health insurance, we are proving that our collective power will outweigh the influence of major campaign donors in elections.
**[Last night provides us with even more proof that the political revolution is growing. Our Revolution is about bringing every person who has been left out into the political process. Chip in $5 to help build this grassroots movement across our country.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e73/3947947075/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-candidates?refcode=em180808-full")**
You are a part of making history last night. Let's keep working for more nights like these and together we will build a movement to transform this country.
In solidarity,
Shailene Woodley
Our Revolution Board Member
**[DONATE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e73/3947947075/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-candidates?refcode=em180808-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e72/3947947075/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e7d/3947947075/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e7c/3947947075/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a995/bed43eb/7d397346/75fd7e7f/3947947075/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: 248% more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Earlier this week, we learned that as CEO of Celgene, Bob Hugin slashed drug prices in Russia while raising them for American cancer patients. In fact, last year alone, he gave Russia a 45% break in costs while patients here at home took it on the chin.

[**New Jerseyans deserve a Senator who will put the needs of regular people above those of Donald Trump, Vladimir Putin, and Wall Street investors. Chip in $3 or more now and help make sure Senator Bob Menendez defeats Bob Hugin in November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca7/3af3c5d/3a0e0c5e/4ec3e5ce/773440702/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_russiapricing?gpsid=5_73_2705&refcode=em18_180808_Rusia2_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180808_Rusia2_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+New+Jerseyans+deserve+a+Senator+who+will")

_NJ.com_ reported that a 21-tablet supply of Revlimid costs $14,529 in the United States but is only $4,175 in Russia. That means Hugin charged Americans **248 percent more** than Russians for the same life-saving medicine. For no good reason other than corporate greed.

Unlike Bob Hugin, Senator Bob Menendez never has and never will turn his back on the American people. He'll keep fighting for lower drug costs and to provide affordable healthcare for all Americans.

[**Chip in $3 or more and help Democratic Senator Bob Menendez beat Bob Hugin this November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca7/3af3c5d/3a0e0c5e/4ec3e5c1/773440702/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_russiapricing?gpsid=5_73_2705&refcode=em18_180808_Rusia2_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180808_Rusia2_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+3+or+more+and+help+Democratic+Se")

Thank you,

Frank

If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a....
Friend, in less than one week, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country.

You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not.

If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate.

Let's just be honest. I’m the only candidate in this race who has what it takes to defeat a swamp-dwelling elitist like Tammy Baldwin. That means: if we lose, Republicans could lose the majority.

That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We just can't afford to lose!

That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this primary.
