This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=-ifvCOt9mxSnCmKvMzY9p3HKy45PFb1t8xNmoVRtMA8H8F0IxdSIJmMo7gsiHqa1bl5IpXpDqgJmF08DmA-qat8qIRXk1fHYARz1lZ5Tb63AweI9zA1db0ahjjkktNmj7WrvQ3ZiLmlKIoBvWccPVFalkuZxRoE_19-HSSNOPwPXakFBGzzS6k5aLqU0oxFHjdjeVER6Mp1lN3tHdK_3hVCWg_lyEBnfmaA18HlYAJQaHLeG6_f6W5ncpbCoHwa7). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=KLN31sapaZPP6-CcZCGkTrhBDPApHhClnbOoj9Gp449uKg6e_fVhPe6-c5eRbSx8UsITBJX8sEng1oxljvADRykokDIXZJdP7vu3a8lwZ1koyVrF3RRgLlhDu8Dd7lrtDz00BR_NLI0AZB5VjOv9hZ720TqJEHdL1wpcKaSEvnIp4A4eSBUHxll4ZKaQqQgJ5rgdef0M-qThB1gMgQo52TfJz3i7aEQZYO0QWBkSKtlWVcCXDbyYz66KhG-Gv6-NlQvuEN0Qjy7VszwtYcW_kTwVd-dJbQGeWkSAzilVh-CR6c36hevaWW_3okmoidiBwqHklLaPvHrPvMyj__GAGciGweg4fVmE43WODaNG8jLd6EYvg0kGvC3-UlQt8Htm) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=KLN31sapaZPP6-CcZCGkTrhBDPApHhClnbOoj9Gp449s1ET05wBAcj9bWeK_Iz0f9CTO6Q9fXnwEwJGIiTg6d1T4LOQpvj4VMDVZBqmc-Ob-irooP6-GdtoXRLCydfksjnVc_8W3xpGoBIHoNPGMDpnLwNrSQoNcdAjzdfGo2rfRiFOXTcBtMdz1qU8wDLYw_Tlwg5NIUMXzLr0MoGJYaRjZUwmpYFkokA8AOOqcopxqU4GYJSd3elCxOCCDPfINPb0x1wObhAI-IV5Imt9YBYu9auMnGQciKY_3iEodTXCwP0QVq9yw1PjCZ9X_dIfDbTo_SCG_kZ1xsDafUJa_aHwxUkBU7Uh1uYU45qFDB1RGXZD1ct218W7c6eBHSLfh) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=KLN31sapaZPP6-CcZCGkTjMN0jWDy4nYROGcs0wjl2vnKrjIFZKcpilRO23cRwqi5V87cmK1T0ewKJVIO2350tpJMBG9l330_u8DNreycby0G9tmcrVfzUEJhcuQK9TXmUe-6b48eT2qu31fYHctxW1qw3UfjG66anpAiSnc_j5oS2YTrwU9fb63bv58SHFiUg0B3yZN5oInz7RsrO2DPImbHkMcwebydo6Qos5cCB5_2fRRA3Z-bN8V-b13eCdjb3A2rPcH1TuQ582j-Op-FQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=KLN31sapaZPP6-CcZCGkTtQf60Iiwf4_RoSF_DPPzihl5gtAxJQ_GmDqwxlQtRiYj26No-LV-my6WMyjFn-wTjSIIGa8N6_EF3bVdgrZRadUH1yC3CwmRzrDWoUExFdc4vfEfg-5FCNMPjlPPM80kR--zLh1OJ5N1O8KM_6sgrJA2qRb63ZSu7QH9vZ-Nr33NrsosNfmtjbBRC2tTv7xpde7YiNeiXGl3IxjwGDv_N9AOfmrh5PPWBhlPaRFGWXd5JmhOM1PJfjqsauSRv5seg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=KLN31sapaZPP6-CcZCGkTqnTcPPFKymtZAovzSlucX8KV8v9mNQXbbEn-IyLWGsyZokL1yBuHBwYBWHhF3RakSDp49QtJT3tJhTJ31znyrUIWOK48pwwPRDyn4wXqMZIUKCnSf0DUyXvIQ3b8aI67WqLpg9vMW4tqa1UiPTFg4hsRgc-n-Y9EKsNLfSKefkwtDnyWMVFSpyjSxlLZdZGdmqAYRxocVUZvrz2yNSdq4lEpiy6TIt2ltUkN4RGA3xQ5FfFjkx5vAD8k1k1NlNEBw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=KLN31sapaZPP6-CcZCGkTrhBDPApHhClnbOoj9Gp448tJFt3FFF_VonW6Iy3X19LM5LZRLfmdow6J6b1pv-GV46B6g1eXaueXEnzNdkIYxaVsGOvZTd4W6ixLVvfHGrkAHptomjpyoEaLuQJedO2HSS4CWXAdH8uE9S_vI8cLTSCwvSkXWnnccC24Xc9BpBOlpnRisLx3SbviTq5Ht15Y2PnbXV9HblLZV_T7Es5e-11hlQPcqL0wurMqZxEz9wZigX0UWhKNmG4WdRXhHJKDEvPybyXuw2ZEvHtpAEN-6r984KiaABp4x3kZASEpvlqsmeyN6_aSDrIJDjh5bbnILSIFM6gkjAT3hnDsGqMw8j8spXe3HhWzPqbhg-t2Ryp45CcmrxjXwLm7ZJdJ3xjTg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=-ifvCOt9mxSnCmKvMzY9p3HKy45PFb1t8xNmoVRtMA8H8F0IxdSIJmMo7gsiHqa1bl5IpXpDqgJmF08DmA-qat8qIRXk1fHYARz1lZ5Tb63AweI9zA1db0ahjjkktNmj7WrvQ3ZiLmlKIoBvWccPVFalkuZxRoE_19-HSSNOPwPXakFBGzzS6k5aLqU0oxFHjdjeVER6Mp1lN3tHdK_3hVCWg_lyEBnfmaA18HlYAJQaHLeG6_f6W5ncpbCoHwa7) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2dd36ce28ba74d17a4dbcd0e996c4884&_e=-ifvCOt9mxSnCmKvMzY9p3HKy45PFb1t8xNmoVRtMA8H8F0IxdSIJmMo7gsiHqa1bl5IpXpDqgJmF08DmA-qat8qIRXk1fHYARz1lZ5Tb63AweI9zA1db0ahjjkktNmj7WrvQ3ZiLmlKIoBvWccPVFalkuZxRoE_19-HSSNOPwPXakFBGzzS6k5aLqU0oxFHjdjeVER6Mp1lN3tHdK_3hVCWg_lyEBnfmaA18HlYAJQaHLeG6_f6W5ncpbCoHwa7) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a.... Friend, in less than one week, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country. You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not. If we win the primary in 6 days, Republicans will have a REAL shot at defeating liberal Tammy Baldwin to get us one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate. Let's just be honest. I’m the only candidate in this race who has what it takes to defeat a swamp-dwelling elitist like Tammy Baldwin. That means: if we lose, Republicans could lose the majority. That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We just can't afford to lose! That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this primary. I know we're coming down to the wire now, friend. Just 6 days left. If you can chip in today to help us raise $100,000, we'll be one step closer to victory. Now is NOT the time to back down, friend. Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until next Tuesday. I am counting on you. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I have a critical FEC reporting deadline coming up at midnight tonight, and we're running short of our goal.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63383b/1a8421e1/1a516b965/48a76d0b/1356688696/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, _I really need your help today._ **I have a critical FEC reporting deadline coming up at midnight tonight, and we 're running short of our goal.** My team tells me that we need to raise another $2,422 to hit our online fundraising target, and we won't make it without you. We don't have much time, so I'm just going to come out and ask: [**Would you consider making a donation of any size so we can finish today strong?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Friend, this deadline marks a critical point in our race in AZ-01, and your support will be critically important.

I'm considered the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and we need to have a strong showing to make sure AZ-01 stays blue this fall. Our numbers will go public after we file them, which means my far-right opponents will be looking for signs that our momentum has slowed. We can't let that happen.

_**After all, the far-right is already coming after me in earnest. **_My opponents are up on TV with ads touting their far-right credentials, and a Super PAC has dropped **$50,000** to prop up one of them.

I'm proud to serve Arizona families in Congress, and I'll keep fighting for you, every day. [**But I 'm counting on you to make sure I meet this goal so my re-election campaign can keep going strong. Please consider chipping in today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.08_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63383b/1a8421e1/1a516b965/48a762f5/1356688696/VEsHBg/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63383b/1a8421e1/1a516b965/48a762f6/1356688696/VEsHAQ/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Peter, You haven't chipped in yet → Can you make your first donation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We are running out of time.
#

Peter -
Tomorrow is an incredibly important day for our campaign. Not only will we close the books on our official fundraising deadline, but we will be exactly five weeks from Election Day.
We are running out of time on all fronts, and after this deadline, we have to publicly report our fundraising numbers for everyone to scrutinize. We need to make it clear that we have more grassroots support than any of our opponents, so we have to ask:
**[Can you make your first $3 donation today? It's not just about what we raise, but more importantly how many people are powering this campaign. We would not ask if it was not important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ee0/6e822e2f/1a39b9ac/4172444c/1135004843/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDgtMi1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180808-2-b")**
We aren't taking any corporate money -- not PACs, not LLCs -- because big money corrupts our politics. It has never been more important for us to have an independent Attorney General, someone who isn't beholden to special interests or big donors.
Whether it's taking on Albany, big pharmaceutical companies or Donald Trump, Zephyr is ready to lead the fight against the corruption that is poisoning our politics. But she needs you to help make that possible.
Thank you!
Team Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ee0/6e822e2f/1a39b9ac/4172444c/1135004843/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDgtMi1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180808-2-b")**

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ee0/6e822e2f/1a39b9ac/4172444d/1135004843/VEsF/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ee0/6e822e2f/1a39b9ac/4172444e/1135004843/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Mary Ellen Smith, bobcasey.com
subject: Don't miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90a9a/3378401146/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Hey team:

I just wanted to make sure you saw Bob's email. The Republican establishment -- up to and including President Trump -- is attacking him because he works for Pennsylvania, not corporate interests.

Trump's visit to Pennsylvania last week raised an estimated $1,000,000 for Bob's opponent. We need to raise an extra $6,400 today to make sure this campaign has the resources to set the record straight. **Can you chip in $5 today to help protect Bob Casey?** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180808_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") Thanks,

Mary Ellen

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Bob (personal)
Date: August 5, 2018

I want to say thank you: to Ruth in Turtle Creek, to Hal in Clarks Summit, to Brian in Johnstown and to every single person who has reached out since President Trump attacked me on Thursday. Your support is the backbone of this campaign, and I am deeply grateful for it.

Lies and smears don't bother me, really, because I know that the people who matter -- Pennsylvania voters -- see through them. No matter what President Trump or Congressman Barletta say about me, they can't undo the fact that I have fought for Medicare and Medicaid, protected affordable health care and just got a landmark workforce training bill passed into law. Those are the things that Pennsylvanians care about, and that's the work I will continue doing if I win re-election.

But we can't forget that when the President speaks, a lot of people hear him. It's never been more important to get my message out to voters and to remind them of the true choice in this race. Doing that costs money, so I'm trying to raise an extra $8,200 today. Can you chip in $5 to help out?

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180808_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90aa4/3378401146/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90aa5/3378401146/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90aa6/3378401146/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90aa7/3378401146/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90aa0/3378401146/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e607a/51dbcc2a/1f3e03e5/3a90aa1/3378401146/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Pledge Alerts at TimKaine.com
subject: [SIGNATURE NEEDED] Stand up and reject hate: Add your name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
We set a goal to get 100,000 signatures and you all have stepped up - big time. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, thank you.

Over the past week, so many people from all across the country have signed on to reject hatred in their communities. **We set a goal to get 100,000 signatures and you all have stepped up -_big time._**

If you haven't taken the pledge yet, it's not too late: Add your name now. [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12e1/3e0906/6ff5407b/3e351aa1/2126899868/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG") Help us prove there's strong grassroots support for standing up to racism, discrimination and hatred - because hate is not an American value.

**[Reject hate: Sign on to our pledge today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12e1/3e0906/6ff5407b/3e351aa0/2126899868/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Reject+hate+Sign+on+to+our+pledge+today&utm_campaign=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG")**

Thank you for helping to prove that hate is not an American value,

_Team Kaine_ | [**TAKE THE PLEDGE TO
REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12e1/3e0906/6ff5407b/3e351aa7/2126899868/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+THE+PLEDGE+TO%0A%09%09%09%09%09REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12e1/3e0906/6ff5407b/3e351aba/2126899868/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG&source=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12e1/3e0906/6ff5407b/3e351ab9/2126899868/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG&source=20180808_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-8-SG")

Arlington, VA 22202
